overall.description: A first-person journey through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, beginning inside a crowded metro train car and transitioning to exterior elevated tracks showcasing neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

standing commuter holding onto support pole

vertical metal support column with handrails
long fluorescent light strips running along the ceiling
illuminated display showing product advertisements above the windows
large glass windows showing dark exterior

segments.scene_description: The segment takes place inside a futuristic metro train car with artificial lighting. The camera moves forward through the narrow enclosed space, passing passengers seated on brown benches and others standing near support pillars. Digital advertisement screens glow above the windows, and overhead LED strips illuminate the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train tracks above cyberpunk city highway

events.description: view transitions from interior train car to exterior elevated tracks overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: observing the cityscape from the moving elevated train

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers against the night sky
multi-lane highway with streams of red and white vehicle lights below
large vertical advertisement with beverage imagery and neon lighting
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and rooftop structures
distant factory chimneys emitting smoke into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide panoramic view of a cyberpunk metropolis at night. The train travels on elevated tracks above a busy highway, with streams of traffic visible below. Distant skyscrapers pierce the dark sky, illuminated by countless windows and neon accents, while industrial smokestacks are visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban corridor with holographic advertisements

events.description: train enters dense urban canyon with close-proximity buildings and large advertisements

agents.ego_description: passing through the narrow urban corridor surrounded by towering advertisements

entered.detail: large red neon sign shaped like lips mounted on building facade
giant three-dimensional hologram of a woman's face with glowing eyes
vertical digital advertisement with bold text and product imagery
illuminated cyan metro station logo mounted on building exterior
tall building column covered in hexagonal cyan light pattern

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a narrow urban canyon flanked by towering buildings covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon signage. A prominent red neon lips sign and a giant holographic face dominate the visual field. The metro 'M' logo appears as the train approaches a station area, with the environment becoming increasingly enclosed by close-proximity architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic interior of a futuristic metro car into the sprawling, neon-drenched expanse of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by gliding forward through the narrow train car, passing seated passengers and glowing digital advertisement screens under the hum of overhead LED strips. As the train emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide panoramic view of the city at night, revealing elevated tracks overlooking streams of highway traffic and distant, illuminated skyscrapers. The perspective then shifts as the train plunges into a narrow urban canyon, where the open skyline is replaced by towering buildings draped in massive holographic faces and vivid red neon signage. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed by dense architecture as the camera approaches a station marked by a prominent metro logo.
